scripts.start:desktop: npm run build --workspace @openclaw-skill-center/web && npm run build --workspace @openclaw-skill-center/desktop && npm run start --workspace @openclaw-skill-center/desktop
scripts.dist:desktop: npm run build --workspace @openclaw-skill-center/web && npm run build --workspace @openclaw-skill-center/desktop && npm run dist:win --workspace @openclaw-skill-center/desktop
scripts.dist:setup: npm run build --workspace @openclaw-skill-center/web && npm run build --workspace @openclaw-skill-center/desktop && npx electron-builder --win dir --publish never --projectDir apps/desktop && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build_winrar_setup.ps1
